name: Scrambled Eggs
instructions: Crack eggs into a bowl and whisk with milk, salt, and pepper.
Melt butter in a nonstick pan over medium heat.
Pour in the eggs and gently stir with a spatula.
Cook until softly set and creamy.
Serve immediately.

name: Classic Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium heat.
Butter one side of each bread slice.
Place one slice butter-side down in the skillet and top with cheese.
Add the second slice of bread butter-side up.
Cook until golden brown on both sides and the cheese is melted.

name: Garlic Butter Pasta
instructions: Cook spaghetti in salted water until al dente.
Melt butter in a pan and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Drain pasta and add it to the pan.
Toss with salt, parmesan, and parsley.
Serve warm.

name: Simple Chicken Stir Fry
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or skillet.
Add chicken and cook until browned.
Add vegetables and stir-fry for 3 to 4 minutes.
Stir in soy sauce, sesame oil, and garlic.
Cook another minute and serve.

name: Avocado Toast
instructions: Toast the bread slices.
Mash the avocado with lemon juice and salt.
Spread the mixture on the toast.
Drizzle with olive oil and serve.

name: Classic Tomato Soup
instructions: Heat oil in a pot and saute the onion until soft.
Add garlic and cook briefly.
Add tomatoes and broth.
Simmer for 20 minutes.
Blend until smooth and season to taste.

name: Simple Greek Salad
instructions: Combine tomatoes, cucumber, and onion in a bowl.
Add feta cheese.
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.
Sprinkle oregano and toss gently.

name: Pan Seared Salmon
instructions: Season salmon with salt and pepper.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook salmon skin-side down for 4 to 5 minutes.
Flip and cook another 3 minutes.
Drizzle with lemon juice and serve.

name: Chicken Quesadilla
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium heat.
Place one tortilla in the pan and add chicken and cheese.
Top with the second tortilla.
Cook until the cheese melts and the tortilla browns.
Slice and serve with salsa.

name: Oatmeal with Honey and Berries
instructions: Bring water and salt to a boil.
Stir in oats and cook for 5 minutes.
Top with berries and honey.
Serve warm.

name: Beef Taco Skillet
instructions: Heat oil and cook the onion until soft.
Add ground beef and brown it.
Stir in taco seasoning and beans.
Cook for 5 minutes.
Top with cheese and serve.

name: Chicken Noodle Soup
instructions: Heat oil and saute the onion, carrot, and celery.
Add broth and bring to a boil.
Add noodles and cook until tender.
Stir in chicken.
Season and serve.

name: Peanut Butter Banana Smoothie
instructions: Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Simple Veggie Omelet
instructions: Whisk eggs with milk and salt.
Melt butter in a skillet.
Cook the vegetables briefly.
Pour in the eggs and cook until set.
Fold the omelet and serve.

name: Spaghetti Marinara
instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions.
Heat marinara sauce in a pan.
Drain pasta and combine with sauce.
Top with parmesan and basil.
Serve hot.

name: Cucumber Yogurt Dip
instructions: Combine yogurt, cucumber, and garlic in a bowl.
Stir in lemon juice and salt.
Mix well.
Serve chilled.

name: Garlic Roasted Potatoes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 F.
Toss potatoes with oil, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Spread on a baking sheet.
Roast for 30 minutes until golden.

name: Simple Pancakes
instructions: Mix flour, sugar, and baking powder.
Whisk egg and milk in another bowl.
Combine wet and dry ingredients.
Cook batter on a buttered skillet until golden.
